name: shut jax up with a kiss
description:

who doesn’t kiss people when they’re talkative? you’re lame if you don’t do it /j

so basically, he kept trying to come up with funny nicknames for you, and then you kissed him to shut him up

again, please tell me anything that went wrong or if anything should be added or removed
